mapper.select: /* OutboundOrderReceiveMapper.xml - selectInterfaceOutboundHeaderList - 출고주문 수신 인터페이스 - 등록 대상 조회 */ SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CTKEY , OWKEY , SOHDKEY AS ORHDKEY , EXTERNORDERKEY , CLAIMNO , ORHDDATE AS OBHDDAY , OBHDTYPECD , OBREQDATE , DLVYTYPECD , TOCTKEY , STOREKEY , DLVYFORMCD , NISCNLRNGCD , ORDPRSNNM , RCPPRSNNM , RCPPRSNTELNO , RCPPRSNTELNO2 , RCPPRSNZIPCD , RCPPRSNADDR1 , RCPPRSNADDR2 , DLVYMSG , CHNLID , CMT , PRCSYN , PRCSDATE , RCVDATE , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY INSERTDATE, SOHDKEY) AS RNO , CNLRSNYN , CNLRSNCD , CNLRSN FROM TWORK_INTF_OB_HD_RCV WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OWKEY = #{owkey} AND PRCSYN = 'N' ) WHERE RNO <= 300

/* OutboundOrderReceiveMapper - selectInterfaceOutboundDetailList - 출고 상세 수신 인터페이스 - 등록 대상 조회 */ SELECT CTKEY , OWKEY , SOHDKEY AS ORHDKEY , SODTKEY AS ORDTKEY , EXTERNORDERKEY , EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY AS EXTERNORDERLINENUM , ICKEY , ICUNITKEY , INITQTY , EXQTY AS EXPCTQTY , UOM , PRCSYN , PRCSDATE , RCVDATE , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_INTF_OB_DT_RCV WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OWKEY = #{owkey} AND SOHDKEY = #{orhdkey} ORDER BY SOHDKEY, CAST(SODTKEY AS NUMERIC)

/* OutboundOrderReceiveMapper.xml - selectObCreateProcObHd - 릴리즈 주문 헤더 생성을 위한 원 출고주문 헤더 정보 조회 */ SELECT ORH.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , ORH.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , '' AS OBHDKEY /*릴리즈코드*/ , ORH.OBHDTYPECD /*출고헤더유형코드*/ , ORH.OBHDDAY /*출고헤더일자*/ , ORH.OBREQDATE /*출고요청일시*/ , ORH.OBCNFRMDATE /*출고확정일시*/ , '00' AS OBSTATUSCD /*출고상태코드*/ , NULL AS WKTYPECD /*작업유형코드*/ , ORH.DLVYTYPECD /*배송유형코드*/ , ORH.DLVYFORMCD /*배송형태코드*/ , ORH.NISCNLRNGCD /*결품취소범위코드*/ , ORH.ORDNM /*주문자명*/ , ORH.RCPPRSNNM /*수령인명*/ , ORH.RCPPRSNTELNO /*수령인전화번호*/ , ORH.RCPPRSNTELNO2 /*수령인전화번호2*/ , ORH.RCPPRSNZIPCD /*수령인우편번호*/ , ORH.RCPPRSNADDR1 /*수령인주소1*/ , ORH.RCPPRSNADDR2 /*수령인주소2*/ , ORH.DLVYMSG /*배송메시지*/ , ORH.CHNLID /*채널아이디*/ , ORH.ACKEY /*거래처코드*/ , ORH.ACNM /*거래처명*/ , ORH.CNTRYCD /*국가코드*/ , ORH.STATE /*도*/ , ORH.CTY /*도시*/ , ORH.DLVRYCORPCD /*택배사코드*/ , '' AS WBLNO /*운송장번호*/ , '00' AS DLVRYPRGRSTATUSCD /*택배진행상태코드*/ , NULL CBM /*체적*/ , NULL WEIGHT /*중량*/ , NULL AS ORDSEPTYPECD /*주문분리유형코드*/
, #{ordsepcritcd} AS ORDSEPCRITCD /*주문분리기준코드*/
, '' AS ORDSEPCRITCD /*주문분리기준코드*/
, '' AS ORDSEPCRITVAL /*주문분리기준값*/
, #{surkey} AS ORDSEPURKEY /*주문분리자*/ , #{sysdate} AS ORDSEPDATE /*주문분리일시*/
, '' AS ORDSEPURKEY /*주문분리자*/ , '' AS ORDSEPDATE /*주문분리일시*/
, '' AS ORDSEPSTRGCD /*주문분리전략코드*/ , '' AS RECOMBOXBARCODE /*추천박스바코드*/ , '' AS PCKGBOXBARCODE /*포장박스바코드*/ , '' AS CLASSIFSPECCD /*분류규격코드*/ , '' AS DASSTNBARCODE /*DAS스테이션바코드*/ , '' AS DASCELLBARCODE /*DAS셀바코드*/ , '' AS CLASSIFCNTRBARCODE /*분류용기바코드*/ , ORH.TOCTKEY /*TO센터코드*/ , ORH.STOREKEY /*점포코드*/ , ORH.IBHDKEY /*입고공통코드*/ , ORH.OBORDKEY /*오더코드*/ , ORH.ORHDKEY /*주문공통코드*/ , ORH.EXTERNORDERKEY /*외부주문번호*/ , '' AS ORGOBHDKEY /*원릴리즈코드*/ , '' AS PKOBHDKEY /*피킹릴리즈코드*/ , ORH.CMT /*비고*/ , '' AS PCKGBOXTYPECD /*포장박스유형코드*/ , '' AS PKCNTRDIVCD /*피킹용기구분*/ , '' AS PKTOTEQTY /*피킹토트수량*/ , '' AS PCKGFLRCD /*포장층코드*/ , ORH.INSERTDATE /*입력일시*/ , ORH.INSERTURKEY /*입력자*/ , ORH.UPDATEDATE /*수정일시*/ , ORH.UPDATEURKEY /*수정자*/ , '' AS WAHDKEY /*웨이브공통코드*/ , '' AS PREOBHDKEY /*이전릴리즈코드*/ FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_ORD_HD ORH WHERE ORH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND ORH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND ORH.OBORDKEY = #{obordkey}

/* OutboundOrderReceiveMapper.xml - selectObCreateProcObDt - 릴리즈 주문 상세 생성을 위한 출고주문 상세 정보 조회 */ SELECT ORD.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , ORD.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , '' AS OBHDKEY /*릴리즈코드*/ , ORD.OBORDDTKEY AS OBDTKEY /*릴리즈상세코드*/ , ORD.ICKEY /*상품코드*/ , '00' AS OBDTSTATUSCD /*출고상세상태코드*/ , ORD.ICUNITKEY /*물품단위코드*/ , ORD.UOM /*상품단위유형*/ , ORD.INITQTY /*초기수량*/ , ORD.EXPCTQTY /*예정수량*/ , 0 AS ALQTY /*할당수량*/ , 0 AS PKISTQTY /*피킹지시수량*/ , 0 AS PKQTY /*피킹수량*/ , 0 AS CLASSIFSQTY /*분류수량*/ , 0 AS PAKQTY /*패킹수량*/ , 0 AS CNFRMQTY /*확정수량*/ , '' AS OBCNFRMDATE /*출고확정일시*/ , '' AS OBCONFIRMURKEY /*출고확정자*/ , ORD.OBORDKEY /*오더코드*/ , ORD.OBORDDTKEY /*오더상세코드*/ , ORD.ORHDKEY /*주문공통코드*/ , ORD.ORDTKEY /*주문상세코드*/ , ORD.EXTERNORDERKEY /*외부주문번호*/ , ORD.EXTERNORDERLINENUM /*외부주문상세코드*/ , ORD.INSERTDATE /*입력일시*/ , ORD.INSERTURKEY /*입력자*/ , ORD.UPDATEDATE /*수정일시*/ , ORD.UPDATEURKEY /*수정자*/ FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_ORD_HD ORH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_ORD_DT ORD ON ORH.CTKEY = ORD.CTKEY AND ORH.OWKEY = ORD.OWKEY AND ORH.OBORDKEY = ORD.OBORDKEY WHERE ORH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND ORH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND ORH.OBORDKEY = #{obordkey} ORDER BY ORH.OBORDKEY, CAST(ORD.OBORDDTKEY AS NUMERIC)
mapper.update: /* OutboundOrderReceiveMapper.xml - callSpObHdInsert - 릴리즈 주문 헤더 생성*/ { CALL SP_OB_HD_INSERT( #{ctkey,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*센터코드*/ , #{owkey,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*화주코드*/ , #{obhdkey,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*릴리즈코드*/ , #{obhdtypecd,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*출고헤더유형코드*/ , #{obhdday,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*출고헤더일자*/ , #{obreqdate,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*출고요청일시*/ , #{obcnfrmdate,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*출고확정일시*/ , #{obstatuscd,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*출고상태*/ , #{wktypecd,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*작업유형*/ , #{dlvytypecd,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*배송유형코드*/ , #{dlvyformcd,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*배송형태코드*/ , #{niscnlrngcd,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*결품취소범위코드*/ , #{ordnm,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*주문자명*/ , #{rcpprsnnm,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*수령인명*/ , #{rcpprsntelno,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*수령인전화번호*/ , #{rcpprsntelno2,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*수령인전화번호2*/ , #{rcpprsnzipcd,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*수령인우편번호*/ , #{rcpprsnaddr1,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*수령인주소1*/ , #{rcpprsnaddr2,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*수령인주소2*/ , #{dlvymsg,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*배송메시지*/ , #{chnlid,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*채널아이디*/ , #{ackey,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*거래처코드*/ , #{acnm,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*거래처명*/ , #{cntrycd,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*국가코드*/ , #{state,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*도*/ , #{cty,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*도시*/ , #{dlvrycorpcd,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*택배사코드*/ , #{wblno,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*운송장번호*/ , #{dlvryprgrstatuscd,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*택배진행상태코드*/ , #{ordsepcritcd,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*주문분리기준코드*/ , #{ordsepcritval,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*주문분리기준값*/ , #{ordsepurkey,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*주문분리자*/ , #{ordsepdate,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*주문분리일시*/ , #{ordsepstrgcd,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*주문분리전략코드*/ , #{pckgboxbarcode,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*포장박스바코드*/ , #{dasstnbarcode,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*DAS스테이션바코드*/ , #{dascellbarcode,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*DAS셀바코드*/ , #{classifcntrbarcode,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*분류용기바코드*/ , #{toctkey,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*TO센터코드*/ , #{storekey,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*점포코드*/ , #{ibhdkey,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*입고공통코드*/ , #{obordkey,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*오더코드*/ , #{orhdkey,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*주문공통코드*/ , #{externorderkey,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*외부주문번호*/ , #{orgobhdkey,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*원릴리즈코드*/ , #{pkobhdkey,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*피킹릴리즈코드*/ , #{preobhdkey,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*이전릴리즈코드*/ , #{cmt,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*비고*/ , #{pckgboxtypecd,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*포장박스유형코드*/ , #{pkcntrdivcd,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*피킹용기구분*/ , #{pktoteqty,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*피킹토트수량*/ , #{pckgflrcd,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*포장층코드*/ , #{sysdate,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*입력일시*/ , #{surkey,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*입력자*/ , #{sysdate,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*수정일시*/ , #{surkey,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*수정자*/ , #{wahdkey,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*웨이브공통코드*/ , 'Y' , #{O_CODE,mode=OUT,jdbcType=VARCHAR} , #{O_ERRM,mode=OUT,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) }
